stories.headline: DeFi TVL Craters $13.2B in 48 Hours as Kelp Contagion Spreads Beyond Aave
stories.tldr: Total value locked across DeFi has plunged by $13.21 billion in two days, with the bleed extending past Aave into lending, restaking, and LRT markets.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Cross-chain restaking was supposed to be DeFi's growth engine in 2026 — this is the first systemic stress test and it's failing live.
the_details: TVL drop of $13.21B between April 18 and April 20 is the sharpest two-day contraction since the March 2023 banking crisis.
Aave alone accounts for $8.45B of the outflows, with restaking tokens and cross-chain bridges absorbing the rest.
Exploiter is still holding ~$97M of rsETH unsold across 20 chains, keeping the overhang live.

stories.headline: SEC Gives DeFi Interfaces Broker-Dealer Exemption in Major Policy Pivot
stories.tldr: SEC staff said it won't object to software providers operating UIs for crypto asset security trading without registering as broker-dealers.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This is the first explicit green light for DeFi frontends under US securities law — a structural unlock after years of enforcement-first posture.
the_details: Guidance issued April 13, 2026 covers interfaces that let users prepare and submit transactions in crypto asset securities.
SEC Chair Paul Atkins reiterated on April 16 podcast that crypto is 'really top on our list' for rule clarity.
Follows March 11 SEC-CFTC MOU committing both agencies to harmonized crypto rulemaking.

stories.headline: Bitcoin Reclaims $75,242 as ETF Bid Absorbs US-Iran Tanker Shock
stories.tldr: BTC rallied from a weekend low after US forces seized an Iranian cargo ship, with institutional ETF demand cushioning geopolitical risk.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The ETF bid is doing what gold used to — absorbing Middle East risk rather than amplifying it. That's a regime change.
the_details: BTC opened Monday at $73,820, 2.5% below Sunday, then rallied to $75,242 by 7:35am ET.
ETH tracked similar path: opened at $2,263, up to $2,307 same window.
US Navy intercepted Iranian cargo ship bound for Strait of Hormuz over weekend.

stories.headline: Fear & Greed Index Crashes to 27 as Solana Leads Altcoin Rout at -3%
stories.tldr: Crypto sentiment hit a three-week low Friday with Fear & Greed at 27, and Solana is leading altcoin losses at -3.06% into Monday.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Sentiment reset below 30 has historically marked local bottoms — but with $195M of live bad debt on Aave, this one has a tail.
the_details: Fear & Greed Index printed 27 Friday, lowest since March 28.
SOL trading in tight $80-$84 band, down 3.06% leading altcoin drawdowns.
DeFi TVL stable at ~$94B across majors despite Kelp fallout; DEX volume $12.3B, off 8%.

stories.headline: Solana Stablecoin Supply Balloons 15x as $3.8B in Capital Rotates In
stories.tldr: Solana's stablecoin supply has grown 15x year-to-date with $3.8B of fresh capital, and monthly DEX volume has now overtaken Ethereum.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Liquidity is voting with its feet — the L1 battle for stablecoin rails may be tipping toward Solana ahead of Firedancer.
the_details: Stablecoin supply on Solana up 15x as of April 16, per on-chain data.
Solana February DEX volume surpassed Ethereum, a first in the current cycle.
Tether committed $147.5M to hack recovery after the April 1 Drift exploit drained $285M.
